domain_description: LLM tool creation and update pipeline -- TypeScript implementation that validates contracts, orchestrates role governance via agent-role-builder, detects create vs update operations, and produces governed tool artifacts.
focus_areas: Contract completeness: all required fields present, Zod schema enforced, no silent defaults for critical fields (LTB-001)
Role governance integration: must call agent-role-builder for role creation unless skip_build_agent_role=true with explicit justification (LTB-002)
Operation detection: create vs update semantics enforced -- update requires baseline_contract_path, create must not silently overwrite (LTB-003)
Validation gates: contract parsed and validated before any side effects (mkdir, writeFile, role build) (LTB-004)
Artifact lifecycle: run-scoped outputs (normalized-request.json, result.json) vs canonical outputs (tool-contract.json, role directory) clearly separated (LTB-005)
Bootstrap mode safety: skip_build_agent_role is an escape hatch -- must be gated, logged, and never the silent default (LTB-006)
Import vs build role path: import_existing_role and agent_role_request_path are mutually exclusive strategies -- no ambiguous fallthrough (LTB-007)
Result status fidelity: status must accurately reflect what happened -- blocked means no artifacts produced, success means all artifacts written and verified (LTB-008)
Baseline contract handling: on update, previous_contract must be read and preserved for diff auditing (LTB-009)
Error propagation: agent-role-builder failures must surface with actionable status_reason, not generic messages (LTB-010)

severity_definitions.blocking: Prevents the tool from being used safely. Must be fixed before freeze.
severity_definitions.major: Significant gap that will cause downstream governance failure or silent data loss. Must be fixed before freeze.
severity_definitions.minor: Small inconsistency or improvement. Can be frozen with conditions.
severity_definitions.suggestion: Nice-to-have improvement. Does not affect freeze decision.

full_sweep_rounds: first and last (when no pushbacks found)
